text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm working in my office as usual when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, uhhh... Excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Do you like chocolate, Big Brother? Does it make
you happy when you receive some?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Do you like chocolate, Big Sister? Does it make
you happy when you receive some?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I hear the word "chocolate," I
remember that today's Valentine's Day.
choice_data_list: I'd say it makes me happy, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Hehe, then I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower runs off without another word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She builds a veritable mountain of chocolates on
my desk.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I made a lot. Some milk chocolates, some dark...
some with nuts, some with strawberries...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pick whichever you want!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pick whichever you want!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You don't want to eat a flavor you don't
like, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why I made so many... Your favorite kind
has to be in there somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Rice Shower put a lot of effort into
making sure I had a good Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... what's wrong? Did I not make your favorite?
choice_data_list: Can I take all of them?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Can you even eat all of them?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Are you... really sure?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems worried about the taste. I should ease
her concerns...
choice_data_list: If I can't do it, will you help me finish them?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... I can eat a ton. Let me know right away
when you've had too much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad I made them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat my first Valentine's Day chocolate while Rice
Shower intensely watches me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems worried about the taste. I should ease
her concerns...
choice_data_list: I want to accept all of your feelings, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You don't have to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... if these chocolates represent my feelings,
then I should have made more.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This isn't nearly enough to show how much you
mean to me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This isn't nearly enough to show how much you
mean to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I spend a sweet Valentine's Day with Rice
Shower.
